segments.title: Initial report of Radix component hydration mismatch
segments.summary: Peter reports a persistent Radix hydration mismatch warning. Justin confirms the issue with Dialog and Popover components and mentions having a `useId` wrapper as a potential fix. Amy asks for a minimal reproduction case, which Justin agrees to provide.
entities: Warning: Prop id did not match
actions: Justin: Push a tiny example after lunch.

segments.title: Hydration warning in Link component
segments.summary: Peter notes a separate hydration warning in the `<Link>` component. Justin acknowledges it and suggests a fix by guarding the prefetch attribute to run only on the client-side.
decisions: Guard `<Link>` prefetch attribute to be client-side only.

segments.title: Decision to implement useId wrapper for Radix fix
segments.summary: A decision is made to ship the `useId` wrapper for the Radix hydration issue as a short-term fix. Justin confirms the file path for the wrapper, and Amy requests a unit test to ensure its correctness.
actions: Amy: Please add a unit test that asserts stable IDs across SSR/CSR for two components rendered in different trees.
decisions: Ship the `useId` wrapper for Radix hydration issue.
Document the React 19 path for the permanent fix.

segments.title: Fix for duplicate symbols on prod builds (PR #752)
segments.summary: Justin confirms he will add the test. He also mentions that PR #752 fixed an issue with duplicate symbols in production builds. Peter will include both fixes in the release notes for Alpha 4.
actions: Peter: Tag both fixes for Alpha 4 notes.

segments.title: Reproduction steps for Radix hydration mismatch
segments.summary: In a thread, Amy provides specific steps to reproduce the Popover hydration mismatch, involving multiple reloads and keyboard interaction. Justin agrees to add these details to the reproduction steps.
actions: Justin: Include Amy's steps in the repro.

segments.title: Logistics and availability of Radix hydration repro app
segments.summary: Peter gives his availability. Justin later announces that the reproduction case for the Radix hydration issue has been pushed to `examples/radix-hydration-repro`.

segments.title: Follow-up on useId wrapper: feature flag and documentation
segments.summary: Justin provides an update on the `useId` wrapper: it is behind a feature flag `deterministicUseId` and documented. Peter requests a console warning for developers, which Justin agrees to add. Amy asks about regressions, and Justin reports none. Finally, Peter asks for a changelog explanation, and Justin provides the technical reason for the original issue.
actions: Justin: Add a warning guard around typical Radix components.
Peter: Add a 'Why this happened' section to the changelog.
